---
title: "Chip Brock"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: media/chip_c.jpeg
  #image-shape: round
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/raymond-brock-47261919/
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:brockr@msu.edu
    - text: Facebook
      href: https://www.facebook.com/chip.brock1
    - text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/chipbrock.bsky.social
    - text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=vfLYgg8AAAAJ&hl=en
    - text: ORCiD
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4556-9212
---

I’m an experimental particle physicist at Michigan State University, and I’ve benefited from the U.S. public’s support for my research over the past 50 years. Teaching these topics—especially to non-science students—has been one way to give back, and now I’m bringing these ideas to a broader audience beyond the lecture hall.
